nodes.name: Western violet-backed sunbird
nodes.summary: The western violet-backed sunbird or Longuemare's sunbird (Anthreptes longuemarei) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is the most widely ranging species in the violet-backed sunbird superspecies, ranging throughout a large part of tropical mainland sub-Saharan Africa not inhabited by other members of the superspecies. It is mainly found in regions with mesic woodland. References External links (Western) violet-backed sunbird - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
